name: Zoho CRM
description: Access Zoho CRM, Desk, and Books data. Manage leads, contacts, deals, support tickets, and invoices through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires Zoho OAuth 2.0 client credentials.

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://api-console.zoho.com/ and create a new Server-based Application
2. Set a valid Redirect URI for your application
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Generate a refresh token using the Self Client option or authorization code flow
5. Enter the Client ID and Client Secret in the server configuration

This template uses the @macnishio/zoho-mcp-server1 community package which supports Zoho CRM, Desk, and Books integration. Additional credentials (ZOHO_DESK_CLIENT_ID, ZOHO_DESK_CLIENT_SECRET, ZOHO_BOOKS_CLIENT_ID, ZOHO_BOOKS_CLIENT_SECRET) can be configured for Desk and Books access.

Note: Zoho has regional data centers. For non-US accounts, replace 'zoho.com' with the appropriate domain:
- EU: zoho.eu
- India: zoho.in
- Australia: zoho.com.au
- China: zoho.com.cn
- Japan: zoho.jp
- Canada: zohocloud.ca
- Saudi Arabia: zoho.sa
